dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node

    Classes in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node that implement NodeBehaviorStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultNodeBehavior
    An abstract base class providing default behaviors for Bitcoin network nodes within the Simulation environment.
    class 
    HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Implements a hidden chain attack strategy for Bitcoin network simulation.
    class 
    HonestNodeBehavior
    Implements the canonical ("honest") node behavior in the simulated Bitcoin network.
    class 
    HonestNodeBehaviorLimited
     
    class 
    MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated

    Method
    Description
    void
    BitcoinNode.setBehaviorStrategy(NodeBehaviorStrategy strategy)
    Sets the node's NodeBehaviorStrategy, e.g., Honest or Malicious.
